items.title: Djokovic shakes off rust to sidestep Mpetshi Perricard
items.summary: Novak Djokovic shows signs of rust as he is forced to fight back from a set down to beat Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard in the first round of the French Open.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Wyndham Clark's girlfriend shares new update after golfer's CJ Cup Byron Nelson win
items.summary: Wyndham Clark delivered one of the best rounds of his career Sunday
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Man Utd target West Ham's Fernandes - Monday's gossip
items.summary: Manchester United target West Ham's Mateus Fernandes and Atalanta's Ederson, Tottenham chase Paulo Dybala and Nottingham Forest seek Middlesbrough's Hayden Hackney, plus more.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
